operational_knowledge_units.title: Ignition maps tipper and hospital tags for OptiSweep communication
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that all tipper and hospital tags are mapped in Ignition, and that OptiSweep communication uses a tag provider mapped under Ignition.
observed_evidence: “All tippers and Hospitals tags are mapped in Ignition.”
“For OptiSweep to communicate we utilize tag provider and are mapped under Ignition.”
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: In the OptiSweep training deck, the Tags slide says all tipper and hospital tags are mapped in Ignition. It also says OptiSweep communication uses a tag provider that is mapped under Ignition.

operational_knowledge_units.title: SYS1 converts metrics into tags for Aveva consumption
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide identifies SYS1 as the location where metrics are converted into tags for Aveva to read.
observed_evidence: “SYS1 is where all metrics are converted to tags for Aveva to read.”
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: The slide states that SYS1 is where all metrics are converted to tags, and those tags are read by Aveva.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: No reusable procedure present on tag mapping slide
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Bullet slide describing that tipper and hospital tags are mapped in Ignition, OptiSweep uses a tag provider under Ignition, and SYS1 converts metrics to tags for Aveva.
warnings: Slide provides architecture and data-flow context only.
No explicit action sequence, configuration steps, validation steps, or operator instructions are shown.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Discarded as a procedure candidate because the slide only describes how tags are mapped in Ignition and how SYS1 converts metrics to tags for Aveva. It does not provide a reusable step-by-step operational procedure.
